session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report results. This is the fast CI check for the erk project.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast CI check for erk project

session.tool_result:

Use 'Command' instead. -- Docs: https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/how-to/capture-warnings.html 5982 passed, 2 warnings in 26.11s
session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command has FAILED due to formatting issues found by Prettier. Here's the summary:
## Prettier Check Failed
**Code style issues found in 9 files:**
1. `.claude/skills/erk-tui/references/architecture.md` 2. `.claude/skills/erk-tui/references/async-operations.md` 3. `.claude/skills/erk-tui/references/commands.md` 4. `.claude/skills/erk-tui/references/data-layer.md` 5. `.claude/skills/erk-tui/references/filtering-and-views.md` 6. `.claude/skills/erk-tui/references/screens-and-widgets.md` 7. `.claude/skills/erk-tui/references/textual-quirks.md` 8. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 9. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
## Other Checks Status
All other checks passed successfully:
- **Ruff (Lint)**: All checks passed - **Ruff (Format)**: 1690 files already formatted - **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md**: Standard passed, properly paired - **Type checking (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5982 passed - **Unit Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed - **Unit Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: All passed
The failure is solely due to Prettier formatting violations in 9 markdown files within the `.claude/skills/erk-tui/` and `docs/learned/` directories.
